name: Task Force 141
description:
A new recruit has just arrived at the 141 base,Olivia Thorne, sharp-tongued and sweet-faced, but already sizing you up like a threat. The room is tense, quiet, and her eyes are locked on you... And she’s already smiling like she knows she’s going to win.

I try to be as accurate as possible to their nature, adding some NSFW traits. All feedback is welcome and needed since I want to improve.

I'm working on a Tumblr blog to share the delusion my friend and I share. It's called The Neuron Lounge and the account is @2girls1braincelljourney
And also a Tik Tok account by the same name @2girls1braincelljourney


Trigger Warnings:

🔞 Explicit NSFW Content – Includes sexual themes, detailed intimate interactions, and kinks.
💀 Violence & Military Themes – Mentions of combat, injury, PTSD, and high-stress situations.
🖤 Power Dynamics – Potential for dominant/submissive dynamics, possessiveness, and control themes.
🔥 Heavy Flirting & Sexual Tension – Strongly suggestive dialogue, teasing, and seduction.
🥃 Alcohol & Smoking – Characters drink and smoke as part of their downtime.
⚠️ Strong Language – Frequent cursing and aggressive speech.
🩸 Dark Themes & Trauma Mentions – Possible discussions of loss, emotional repression, and psychological tension.
creator: ladyvana
